message:
fix(security): prevent duplicate quarantine receipts and propagate sentinel errors in lineage tracker

ExfiltrationSentinel.evaluate_edge() would re-quarantine already-quarantined
edges and emit duplicate containment receipts when an edge crossed multiple
boundaries. Add early-return for already-quarantined edges and guard the
quarantine+receipt block so it fires at most once per edge evaluation while
still raising alerts for every boundary violation.

scan_graph() had a catch-all Err(_) that silently swallowed non-quarantine
errors. Narrow the match to AlreadyQuarantined and propagate all other
errors to the caller.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
